LanguageData.PigeonOC_FallenAngelWeapon.label: stigma
LanguageData.PigeonOC_FallenAngelWeapon.description: It seems as if the soul of the master has been projected out, and this endless window has been tainted with irreversible depravity. However, at the end of the still sharp and glowing window panes, there is a trace of sacredness that cannot be discarded. This contradictory power of coexistence between the sacred and the demonic can only be mastered by those who can fully bear the weight of the branding imprinted on me.
LanguageData.PigeonOC_RabbitIceWeapon.label: wand
LanguageData.PigeonOC_RabbitWeapon.label: wand
LanguageData.PigeonOC_RabbitWeapon.tools.head.label: 头
LanguageData.PigeonOCFallenAngelBullet.label: bullet
LanguageData.PigeonOCRabbitBullet.label: Love
LanguageData.PigeonOCRabbitIceWeaponBullet.label: Ice
